{{Quote|You really are a contemptible vermin, Tookarti.|Count Dooku, to Tookarti|<ref name="SWR 54" />}}
'''Tookarti''' was a [[Chadra-Fan/Legends|Chadra-Fan]] denizen of [[The Wheel/Legends|the Wheel]] during the early days of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
[[File:TookartiDooku-Republic49.jpg|thumb|left|Dooku contacts Tookarti.]]
Just prior to the [[Battle of Kamino/Legends|Battle of Kamino]], [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] traveled to [[The Wheel/Legends|the Wheel]] in search of her former [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]]. At the time, Secura was traveling under the alias "Jayzaa," so as not to expose Quinlan's alias of "Quinlan Vos," whom she claimed owed her money. When she arrived, Tookarti acted as her guide.

Fearing that "Jaayza" was a spy or assassin, Tookarti hired a few thugs to "inflict truth" on her. However, the Jedi easily defeated them and forced the Chadra-Fan to take her to Vos. To Tookarti's surprise, "Jaayza" and "Korto Vos" knew each other. He then helped them locate [[Khaleen Hentz/Legends|Khaleen Hentz]], which led them to [[Zenex]] and his contact. Unbeknownst to all parties, Tookarti was secretly a double agent for [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], but he was confused as to why Dooku wanted the Jedi to discover the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] plans to attack [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]].

Later, Tookarti betrayed Vos on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] which led the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] to send [[Agen Kolar/Legends|Agen Kolar]] to bring him in. Secretly, the Council knew Kolar would fail in his mission and thus making Vos' fall to the Dark Side more believable. After escaping Kolar, Vos found Tookarti and decapitated him.
